metadata.title: Supercharged Links
metadata.description: Add properties and menu options to links and style them!

regex.source: .setName('Search for attribute in Inline fields like <field::>')
regex.target: .setName('在 <field::> 这样的内联字段中搜索属性')
.setName("在上下文菜单中显示字段选项")

regex.source:
.setDesc("Attributes selects YAML and DataView attributes" +
            ", tags chooses the tags of a note, and path considers the name of the note including in what folder it is.")
regex.target: .setDesc("“Attributes”选择YAML和DataView属性，“tags”选择笔记的标签，“path”考虑笔记的名称及其所在的文件夹。")

regex.source: .setDesc("What attribute to target? Make sure to first add target attributes to the settings at the top!")
regex.target: .setDesc("要针对哪个属性？请确保首先在顶部设置中添加目标属性！")

regex.source: .setDesc("How to compare the attribute or path with the given value.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如何将属性或路径与给定值进行比较。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Should the matching of the value be case sensitive?")
regex.target: .setDesc("值的匹配是否应区分大小写？")

regex.source:
.setDesc("What styling options are active? " +
            "Disabling options you won't use can improve performance slightly.")
regex.target: .setDesc("哪些样式选项处于活动状态？禁用您不会使用的选项可以略微提高性能。")
.setDesc('要针对的前置元数据属性，用逗号分隔')

regex.source: .setDesc('If true, this will also supercharge internal links in the editor view of a note.')
regex.target: .setDesc('如果为真，这也将增强笔记编辑器视图中的内部链接。')

regex.source: .setDesc('If true, this will also supercharge the headers of a tab.')
regex.target: .setDesc('如果为真，这也将增强标签页的标题。')

regex.source: .setDesc('If true, this will also supercharge the file browser.')
regex.target: .setDesc('如果为真，这也将增强文件浏览器。')

regex.source: .setDesc('If true, this will also supercharge plugins like the backlinks and forward links panels.')
regex.target: .setDesc('如果为真，这也将增强诸如反向链接和正向链接面板之类的插件。')

regex.source: .setDesc('If true, this will also supercharge the quick switcher.')
regex.target: .setDesc('如果为真，这也将增强快速切换器。')

regex.source: .setDesc('If true, this will also supercharge the link autocompleter.')
regex.target: .setDesc('如果为真，这也将增强链接自动完成器。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Sets the `data-link-tags`-attribute to look for tags both in the frontmatter and in the file as #tag-name')
regex.target: .setDesc('设置 `data-link-tags` 属性，以便在前置元数据和文件中查找 #tag-name 形式的标签')

regex.source: .setDesc('Sets the `data-link-<field>`-attribute to the value of inline fields')
regex.target: .setDesc('将 `data-link-<field>` 属性设置为内联字段的值')

regex.source:
.setDesc('If true, this will automatically activate the generated CSS snippet "supercharged-links-gen.css". ' +
            'Turn this off if you don\'t want this to happen.')
regex.target: .setDesc('如果为真，这将自动激活生成的CSS代码片段“supercharged-links-gen.css”。如果您不希望发生这种情况，请关闭此选项。')

regex.source: .setDesc("This feature has been migrated to metadata-menu plugin https://github.com/mdelobelle/metadatamenu")
regex.target: .setDesc("此功能已迁移到 metadata-menu 插件 https://github.com/mdelobelle/metadatamenu")

regex.source: .setDesc("Create a new selector to style with Style Settings.")
regex.target: .setDesc("创建一个新的选择器，以便使用样式设置进行样式设置。")
.setPlaceholder('以字符串形式输入属性，用逗号分隔')

regex.source: .setTooltip("Add optional background or underline to link")
regex.target: .setTooltip("为链接添加可选背景或下划线")
